description: The regression formula used to estimate a 1RM (or similar threshold) from a submaximal set (§5.11, OB-32). Only meaningful when the entry's `source` is `estimated` — MUST NOT be present when `source` is `tested`. Seeded from the six formulas OpenWeight's Estimated1RM enumerates; open token, so a producer using a formula not listed here still round-trips.
